properties.name: customId
properties.label: Menu ID
properties.description: Unique id for this panel menu, e.g. financialStatements

properties.name: targetMenuId
properties.label: Hosted report menu ID
properties.description: customId of the report menu to host below the panel (a JasperReports menu, datalist, or chart in this same userview).

properties.name: columns
properties.label: Grid columns
properties.description: Number of input columns in the panel.

properties.name: parameters
properties.label: Parameters
properties.description: One row per filter. type = date | daterange | text | number | select | multiselect. For select/multiselect set optionsSource = static (use Static options 'code|label;code|label') or lookup (use Lookup table/code/name). default may be a hash variable, e.g. #date.now# or #currentUser.username#. Mark 'bound' = true to force the value from default (self-scoped, read-only). For daterange, the To picker uses 'To param name' / 'Default To'.
